dialogos.texto_en: Hey there.\nIt's morning already, wake up.
Raiha...?\nSorry, I'm getting up now...
Heheh, nooope.\nCome on, if you don't wake up%p-2;――
UWAAH?!\nI-Ichi-Ichika?!
Good morning, Futaro-kun.\nWhy are you so surprised?
Why? Why are you here%p-2;――
Oh, that's right. \nWe're in the same room, aren't we...?
Teehee!\nYou're still half asleep.\nCome on, wake up.
It's okay, I'm wide awake now\nthanks to the surprise.
But, I'm surprised you woke up before me.
Mmh, how rude.
Believe it or not, I plan on improving\nmy daily routine. After all, we're starting\na new life after graduating high school.
Oh, really?
How's that? Aren't I great?
Yeah, I think it's a good idea.
So, can I ask you for a favor as a reward?
A favor?\nDon't ask for something unreasonable.
So cautious, aren't you.\nI just want you to join me for a run.
A run?\nWhy, all of a sudden?
Oh, that's right. \nIt is kinda sudden from your point of view.
Actually, running is part of my daily routine.\nI thought I'd get today's run out of the way\nin the morning.
*sigh*\nExercising in the morning, huh...
Wow, you're not thrilled.\nDon't worry, I won't run you ragged\nfirst thing in the morning.
Go for it, big bro.
Oh, Raiha-chan. Good morning.
Good morning, Ichika-san.\nGood morning, big bro.
Morning.\nBut, this is easier said than done.
She invited you out, right?\nI think it'll be a good memory for you guys.
(...I see.\n This is also making memories with the two of us.)
Got it.\nI'll change, so wait a sec.
Yay!\nThen, I'll get ready too.
Good luck, you two!
